271.reason: [Same issue as above: if '|' is the last character in file, read() returns -1, which is cast to char and then unread, leading to undefined behavior. Also, lineNum may not reflect the actual line of the error if newline hasn't been processed yet.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [Same issue as above: if '|' is the last character in file, read() returns -1, which is cast to char and then unread, leading to undefined behavior. Also, lineNum may not reflect the actual line of the error if newline hasn't been processed yet.]
